topic: The streetlight outside my window has been broken six months but my room is still lit from outside every night
title: The Streetlight Outside My Window Has Been Broken Six Months. My Room Is Still Lit. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The streetlight outside my window has been broken six months. My room is still lit from outside.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a darkened bedroom at night softly illuminated by a yellow glow coming through the curtains, no light source visible outside, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Second floor walk up. Bedroom faces the street. One streetlight thirty feet away.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a second floor apartment window at dusk viewed from across a quiet residential street, a single streetlight pole visible nearby, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sleep with curtains open. Always have.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a window with curtains pulled to either side, the night view of a residential street beyond, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Light burned out in October. City has not replaced it.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a streetlight pole at night with a broken bulb housing visible, no glow, dim ambient moonlight, vertical 9:16 framing
wide interior of a darkened bedroom at night with a soft yellow glow falling across the bed from outside, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Soft yellow glow. Coming from where the streetlight used to be. No actual light source.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of yellow light falling on a hardwood floor through a window, dim ambient bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand pressing back a curtain at a window, only the hand visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The pole is dark. The bulb housing is broken. The street is dark. My room is lit.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dark residential street at night with a streetlight pole visibly dark, no other illumination, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Recorded it on my phone. The footage shows the streetlight on. Time stamp matches reality.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a video recording of a residential street with a clearly lit streetlight visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Looked outside on a different camera. The light was off in that recording. Same time stamp.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of two video frames side by side on a laptop screen showing the same streetlight on and off with identical timestamps, vertical 9:16 framing
wide interior of a bedroom at night with heavy curtains drawn fully closed, soft yellow glow seeping through the fabric, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The glow comes through them. Same shade. Same direction. Lit by something I cannot see.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of curtains glowing softly yellow from outside in a darkened bedroom, the source not visible, vertical 9:16 framing
